results.label: ✅ Gateway selection screen dikhani hai?
results.description: Yes rakhen to Website/Portfolio choose karne wala Gateway khulega.

results.label: ⚠ Site ka initial mode
results.description: Gateway background ke liye is field ka use na karein. Gateway dikhana ho to Gateway selection screen choose karein.

results.label: ✅ Website mode enable rahe?
results.description: No karne par Website option unavailable ho jayega.

results.label: ✅ Portfolio mode enable rahe?
results.description: No karne par Portfolio option unavailable ho jayega.

results.label: ✅ Website/Portfolio switch button dikhana hai?
results.description: Site ke andar floating mode-switch button show/hide karta hai.

results.label: ✅ Switch par Website ka label
results.description: Floating switch me Website side par dikhne wala text.

results.label: ✅ Switch par Portfolio ka label
results.description: Floating switch me Portfolio side par dikhne wala text.

results.label: ⚠ Basic switch position (fallback)
results.description: Sirf tab use hota hai jab Advanced Switch Position Controls = Inherit ho.

results.label: ✅ Visitor ka last mode yaad rakhna hai?
results.description: Yes par user ke switch/card click ke baad browser localStorage me last mode save hoga. Existing tab me default-mode test ke liye Incognito ya storage clear karein.

results.label: ✅ Website me Tools section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me Tools section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Website me Downloads section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me Downloads section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Website me Projects section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me Projects section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Website me Skills section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me Skills section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Website me Docs section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me Docs section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Website me Faq section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me Faq section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Website me About section dikhana hai?
results.description: Yes par Website mode me About section visible hoga; No par hidden rahega.

results.label: ✅ Show Quick Commands Card? (yes/no)
results.description: Yes se feature visible/enabled hoga; No se hide/disable hoga.

results.label: ⚠ URL se mode choose karne dena hai?
results.description: Yes par page reload/open ke waqt ?mode=website, ?mode=portfolio aur ?mode=gateway read hoga. Current page par option change karte hi mode automatically switch nahi hota.

results.label: ⚠ Escape key se Gateway close ho?
results.description: Gateway visible hone par keyboard Escape action ko enable/disable karta hai. Mobile touch par iska visible effect nahi hai.

results.label: ⚠ Escape ke baad kaunsa mode khule?
results.description: Sirf Allow Escape = Yes aur Gateway visible hone par Escape press karne ke baad selected mode khulta hai.

results.label: ⚠ Terminal preview ka final ready message
results.description: Tools cards render hone ke baad terminal preview ki last line me dikhai deta hai. Terminal Preview hidden ho to visible effect nahi hoga.

results.label: ⚠ Copy button default tooltip
results.description: Command blocks ke copy button par hover/accessible title. Dynamic content render ke baad apply hota hai.

results.label: ⚠ Copy successful message
results.description: Copy button click successful hone ke baad temporary tooltip/accessible message.

results.label: ⚠ Copy failed message
results.description: Clipboard copy fail hone par temporary tooltip/accessible message.

results.label: ⚠ Copy button screen-reader label
results.description: Command copy buttons ka accessibility label. Visible text nahi hai.

results.label: ⚠ JSON failure warning dikhani hai?
results.description: Normal successful load me kuch nahi dikhata. Sirf CMS JSON load/parse failure detect hone par warning control karta hai.

results.label: ⚠ JSON failure warning title
results.description: Sirf actual data-loading failure ke waqt use hota hai; normal page par visible nahi hoga.

results.label: ⚠ JSON failure warning message
results.description: Sirf actual data-loading failure ke waqt use hota hai; normal page par visible nahi hoga.
options: Some editable CMS files could not load. Safe fallback content is being shown so the page remains usable.

optionResults.value: Some editable CMS files could not load. Safe fallback content is being shown so the page remains usable.

results.label: ⚠ Initial loading status message
results.description: Build-generated critical snapshot me include hota hai aur perceptible slow boot par dikh sakta hai. Save ke baad GitHub Action generator run hona zaroori hai.

results.label: 🔒 Release Version
results.description: System-managed release value. Isko manually edit na karein.

results.label: 🔒 Runtime Schema Version
results.description: Developer-managed schema value. Isko manually edit na karein.

results.label: ✅ Gateway ke peeche kya dikhana hai?
results.description: Portfolio choose karne par Gateway ke background me Portfolio; Website choose karne par Website. Isse card order change nahi hota.

results.label: ✅ Gateway ka main title
results.description: Gateway panel ka sabse bada heading text.

results.label: ✅ Gateway subtitle
results.description: Main title ke neeche dikhne wala explanation text.
options: Open the tools website or view the portfolio.

optionResults.value: Open the tools website or view the portfolio.

results.description: Yes se feature visible/enabled hoga; No se hide/disable hoga.

results.label: ✅ Website card ka description
results.description: Website card ke andar short explanation.

results.description: Website card ke action/button par dikhne wala text.

results.label: ✅ Show Card Icons? (yes/no)
results.description: Yes se feature visible/enabled hoga; No se hide/disable hoga.

results.label: ✅ Show Card Kicker Labels? (yes/no)
results.description: Yes se feature visible/enabled hoga; No se hide/disable hoga.

results.label: ✅ Show Card Button Labels? (yes/no)

results.description: Live site me “Gateway Footer Note” ke liye dikhne/used hone wala content.

results.label: ✅ Show Gateway Footer Note? (yes/no)
results.description: Yes se feature visible/enabled hoga; No se hide/disable hoga.

results.label: ⚠ Gateway baseline style
results.description: Normally as-is rakhein. Advanced Appearance = Custom hone par detailed design settings isko override kar sakti hain.

results.label: ⚠ Gateway baseline animation
results.description: Normally as-is rakhein. Advanced Animation = Custom hone par detailed animation settings use hongi.

results.label: ⚠ Baseline background blur
results.description: Gateway ke peeche background blur. Advanced Appearance custom ho to us group ki value priority legi. Allowed range: 0–18. Out-of-range value runtime me clamp hoti hai.

results.label: ⚠ Baseline background darkness
results.description: Gateway overlay ki baseline darkness. Advanced Appearance custom ho to us group ki value priority legi. Allowed range: 0–0.9. Out-of-range value runtime me clamp hoti hai.

results.label: ⚠ Basic Gateway panel width
results.description: Sirf Advanced Gateway Appearance = Inherit hone par basic width apply hoti hai. Valid value jaise 680px, 42rem ya 80vw likhein; invalid value 680px par fallback hoti hai.

results.label: ⚠ Gateway advanced groups enable?
results.description: Yes zaroori hai. No karne par Layout, Appearance, Animation aur Interaction ke sab custom groups intentionally ignore honge.

results.label: 🔒 Legacy Gateway preset
results.description: Backward compatibility field. Current grouped controls ke saath iska direct effect nahi hai.

results.label: ✅ Gateway layout & card-order control
results.description: Card order, row/column aur panel position edit karni ho to Custom. Isse colors/animation change nahi honge.

results.label: ⚠ Gateway colors, blur & card design
results.description: Sirf visual design manually change karna ho to Custom; otherwise Inherit rakhein.

results.label: ⚠ Gateway entry animations
results.description: Sirf animations/timing manually change karni ho to Custom; otherwise Inherit rakhein.

results.label: ⚠ Gateway hover & click effects
results.description: Sirf hover/click effects manually change karne ho to Custom; otherwise Inherit rakhein.

results.label: ✅ Gateway me kaunsa card pehle?
results.description: Sirf card order badalta hai. Layout Controls = Custom hona chahiye.

results.label: ✅ Desktop par cards ka layout
results.description: Desktop par side-by-side ya one-below-another. Layout Controls = Custom hona chahiye.

results.label: ✅ Tablet par cards ka layout
results.description: Tablet portrait/landscape breakpoint par row ya column. Layout Controls = Custom hona chahiye.

results.label: ✅ Mobile par cards ka layout
results.description: Mobile par row ya column. Usually column easiest hota hai.

results.label: ✅ Desktop Gateway panel position
results.description: Desktop screen par Gateway panel kahan rahega. Layout Controls = Custom hona chahiye.

results.label: ✅ Tablet Gateway panel position
results.description: Tablet screen par Gateway panel kahan rahega.

results.label: ✅ Mobile Gateway panel position
results.description: Mobile screen par Gateway panel kahan rahega.

results.label: Panel Content Layout
results.description: Sirf Layout & Order Controls = Custom hone par apply hota hai.

results.label: Panel Maximum Width (px)
results.description: Sirf Appearance Controls = Custom hone par apply hota hai. Sirf order change karna ho to is field ko edit na karein. Allowed range: 320–1400. Out-of-range value runtime me clamp hoti hai.

results.label: Panel Maximum Height (viewport %)
results.description: Sirf Appearance Controls = Custom hone par apply hota hai. Sirf order change karna ho to is field ko edit na karein. Allowed range: 50–98. Out-of-range value runtime me clamp hoti hai.
